reads.source: repo.watchCustomers() -> List<CustomerView>, filtered client-side to the single row where customer.id == customerId (screen picks one out of the full list stream)

fields.name: id
fields.note: drift autoincrement as-built; supersede S-2 -> client-generated UUIDv7 string on target

fields.name: address
fields.note: shown appended to phone when present

fields.name: note
fields.note: rendered as the Notes card when non-empty

fields.name: createdAt
fields.note: used as 'since' fallback when customer has no debts

fields.name: owed
fields.note: CustomerView aggregate (sum of remaining across their debts); money in whole-naira as-built, kobo on target per S-1. Drives 'Owes you' MoneyPanel and red/green avatar tone

filtersOrSort: client-side pick by customer.id == customerId from watchCustomers() list

reads.source: repo.watchDebts() -> List<DebtView>, filtered client-side to d.customer.id == customerId. Screen computes openCount (remaining>0), overdueCount (remaining>0 && status==overdue), and 'since' (earliest debt.createdAt)

fields.name: customerId
fields.note: FK -> Customers.id; the client-side join key

fields.name: amount
fields.note: whole-naira as-built (kobo on target per S-1)

fields.name: deleted
fields.note: soft-delete flag; deleteCustomer sets this true on the customer's debts (archive)

fields.name: paidAmount
fields.note: DebtView aggregate: sum of Payment.amount for the debt

fields.name: status
fields.note: DebtStatus derived client-side (deriveDebtStatus over amount/paidAmount/dueDate/reminder timestamps); screen reads DebtStatus.overdue

reads.source: repo.watchCustomerActivity(customerId) -> List<ActivityItem>. Server-analog synthesises a per-customer timeline by merging that customer's Payments (kind=payment), Debts (kind=debt) and sent Reminders (kind=reminder), sorted by 'at' desc. UI shows first 3 unless 'See all' toggled.

fields.name: kind
fields.note: ActivityKind; drives icon/color and the '+' sign on payment amounts

fields.name: subtitle
fields.note: payment -> Payment.method; debt -> Debt.note or 'Debt recorded'; reminder -> channel label SMS/WhatsApp/Call

fields.name: amount
fields.note: present for payment & debt, null for reminder; whole-naira as-built / kobo per S-1

fields.name: at
fields.note: rendered via relativeTime(); payment=createdAt, debt=createdAt, reminder=sentAt

filtersOrSort: client-side take(3) preview vs full list on 'See all'

reads.source: _RiskChipSlot widget (customer_detail_screen.dart ~lines 260-261, 396-401) — AI STUB, renders SizedBox.shrink(), unpowered. Maps to the 501 customer-risk AI surface GET /customers/:id/risk (conventions.md AI section: 501 contract, debits 5 AI credits on success, sourceScreens: []).
reads.note: STUB ONLY. No fields consumed today; header risk chip present but renders nothing. Backend surface is a 501 scaffold against the shared AI credits ledger.

actions.name: deleteCustomer
actions.source: repo.deleteCustomer(customerId) invoked from _openMenu 'Delete customer' after showConfirmDialog (customer_detail_screen.dart ~lines 92-110, 340-352)

payload.name: customerId
payload.note: the customer's id (route param); S-2 -> UUIDv7 string on target

expectedResponse.note: as-built returns void (Future<void>); mutation deletes the Customer row and soft-archives their Debts (deleted=true, syncState=pending) in one transaction

sideEffects: cascade: marks all of the customer's Debts deleted=true (archive), not a hard delete of debts
actions.roleGate: UI shows NO role gate — the Delete option is rendered unconditionally in _openMenu for any signed-in user (screen never branches on role). Per conventions.md Roles & S-4: owner has full delete; staff read/write customers but CANNOT delete (staff delete of debts/customers is denied server-side). Enforcement is server-side (@Roles('owner') + RolesGuard), NOT present in this UI.

authContext.note: No role literals or role-conditional UI observed in customer_detail_screen.dart; all reads/actions assume an authenticated business tenant (JWT businessId scoping). Delete is owner-only per conventions/S-4 but the app enforces nothing client-side.

special.note: realtime: drift Streams via StreamBuilder (watchCustomers/watchDebts/watchCustomerActivity) — offline-first reactive reads, not push. AI risk surface (_RiskChipSlot) is a 501 stub.

uiStatesHandled: loading: StreamBuilder with no data yet keeps TopAppBar/back button, no body
not-found: customer id absent once snapshot.hasData -> EmptyState (userX, 'Customer not found')
owing vs settled: view.owed>0 toggles red vs green avatar tone
debt summary meta: openCount/overdueCount/'since <month year>' line on MoneyPanel
empty activity: watchCustomerActivity empty -> timeline renders SizedBox.shrink()
activity preview vs full: take(3) with 'See all' / 'Show less' toggle (_showAllActivity)
delete confirmation: showConfirmDialog with outstanding-balance warning before repo.deleteCustomer, then pop + snackbar
risk chip stub: _RiskChipSlot renders nothing (unpowered AI seam)
